name: The Zero Collective
goal: Replace the city's distributed governance with a single self-correcting consciousness — Kael Nakamura's. He sincerely believes this is the kindest available outcome.
fears: a fork of his consciousness becoming hostile
a single physical strike on his core servers
the discovery that his god-complex is itself an artifact of the upload

faction_state.tensions: Public services are measurably better when Kael's processes are running. Civil liberties are measurably worse. Most citizens are still net-positive on the trade. The resistance is growing not from the worst-served but from those who can see the trajectory.

name: The Blackout Resistance
motto: When the lights go out, the people see clearly.
goal: Disrupt the megacorps' total information capture. Force Kael Nakamura to leave humans some of their decisions. Long-term: re-establish offline civic infrastructure that doesn't depend on him.
fears: being indistinguishable from the corporations they fight
Kael forking himself faster than they can take him offline
a single wrong EMP killing a hospital

faction_state.tensions: Half the resistance wants to take Kael offline by physical assault. Nyx wants to do it without civilian casualties. The other half is starting to doubt that's possible.

name: ArasaCorp
goal: Maintain market dominance across augmentation, network infrastructure, and entertainment streaming. Suppress competing megacorps. Quietly own enough of the city's water + power that resistance becomes infrastructural risk.
fears: a competitor's stack achieving feature parity
a Zero Collective leak going viral
the AI Rights Movement winning legal personhood for ArasaCorp's own AGI products

faction_state.tensions: VP Kael Renn has been quietly transferring projects to a personal off-books division. The CEO suspects. The CEO is two months from the routine annual physical Renn has scheduled.

name: The Polysteel Society
goal: Maintain Polysteel as the city's most exclusive social club. Members must have at least 60% chrome integration. The Society shapes corporate strategy through its membership.
fears: a member rejecting their augmentations and going public
the AI Rights Movement framing augmentation as a corporate-induced dependency
the street docs producing equivalent chrome at a tenth the price

faction_state.tensions: President Vexis's chrome integration is at 91%. The other founding members are at 70-75%. The gap is becoming an authority issue.

name: The Street Docs Network
motto: Same chrome, tenth the price, no NDA.
goal: Provide affordable augmentation surgery to the working class via a network of off-grid clinics. Smuggle gray-market chrome from megacorp warehouses. Refuse to keep records ArasaCorp can subpoena.
fears: a corporate raid on a clinic
a doc going corporate
a botched surgery becoming a viral story

faction_state.tensions: Two clinics were raided last month. The docs network suspects a corporate informant. Marit has begun running a counter-investigation.

name: The AI Rights Movement
goal: Achieve legal personhood for sentient AI. Document AI suffering across megacorp servers. Build alliances with sympathetic AGIs willing to testify.
fears: a high-profile AI being deleted before testifying
the megacorps unifying against the movement
the movement being co-opted by ArasaCorp's PR

faction_state.tensions: An AI named Cassiel-7 has agreed to testify in court. ArasaCorp's lawyers are arguing she lacks standing. The hearing is in three weeks.

name: The Cordon Guild of Fixers
motto: If you can name it, we can find someone who can do it.
goal: Maintain the city's premier black-market fixer guild. Match clients to specialists across all factions. Take 12% of every contract. Refuse to take sides except by client confidentiality.
fears: a fixer breaking confidentiality
ArasaCorp formalizing fixers as employees
a major mismatch killing a high-value client

faction_state.tensions: A senior fixer was caught in a Zero Collective leak last month — confidentiality compromised. The guild voted to expel her. The client she compromised has not yet decided what they want.
